indicators.name: table obstructing floor
indicators.rationale: The table is placed in the middle of the floor, obstructing any potential yoga mat placement.

indicators.name: chairs obstructing floor
indicators.rationale: The chairs are arranged around the table, further obstructing any floor space.

indicators.name: lack of open floor area
indicators.rationale: There is no unobstructed floor area available for yoga mat placement.

indicators.name: no yoga mat present
indicators.rationale: No yoga mat is visible, which is essential for yoga practice.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is poorly suited for yoga or stretching due to the presence of furniture obstructing the floor space and the lack of a yoga mat. The score of 2 reflects the significant obstruction of the floor area and the absence of a yoga mat, making it unsuitable for the intended activity.
